title: Pvp Sword [bare bones]
description: this resourcepack changes default swords to pvp variant
body:
**This resource pack replaces standard bulky swords with sleek, short PvP versions. These compact blades clear your screen, giving you a better field of view during intense duels. Perfect for competitive play and fast-paced combat!**

**_For better work use this rp nighter than original_**
**- [Original Bare Bones R.P](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones)**

_Rp = ResoucePack_
